posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Upcoming platform maintenance today (February 18) at 1:00pm EST

Hi everyone! To restore full platform stability, which was recently impacted by a third-party provider issue, monday.com has scheduled around 15 minutes of maintenance for today, Feb 18th at 1:00pm EST, during which time the platform will be in ‘read-only’ mode. All of the details on the maintenance can be found on our status page, as always, our community and support team are on hand to help with any questions.

posts.cookedHtml: I need help with a situation. I need to figure out how to exactly connect my excel to Zoho can anyone help me???
